channel.title: Meteors on Alien Truth Social
channel.description: Recent content in Meteors on Alien Truth Social

item.title: Ghost rockets
item.description:
Ghost rockets were rocket or missile-shaped unidentified flying objects first sighted in 1946, primarily in Sweden and other Scandinavian countries. While many sightings were attributed to meteors, some displayed characteristics inconsistent with natural phenomena, such as reported maneuverability. Investigations considered origins from former German rocket facilities, with theories suggesting Soviet tests of captured German missiles. However, some military opinions, including a declassified USAF document, suggested the possibility of extraterrestrial origins for these and later flying saucer reports. Similar sightings were also reported in Greece, Portugal, Belgium, and Italy, with investigations in Greece being halted by the army after conferring with foreign officials.

Source: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ghost_rockets
